meaning: n.民歌,歌谣,叙事歌,流行歌曲,情歌
examples: The book reads like a ballad.
Her latest single is a ballad.
Last year Collins wrote a moving ballad which highlighted the plight of the homeless.
Russia gave the maximum 12 points to Azerbaijan's entry - a ballad by Farid Mammadov.
His ballad albums such as "In the Wee Small Hours" set a high bar.
